collection: CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S ; CUL, T-S
description: Small document(s) in Arabic script, legal or official. Note that these are not actual joins, but they are all from the same genre of document and some may have been produced by the same scribe. Each one has a person's name underneath the basmala at upper right: Abū Naṣr... Abū ʿImrān... Mufaḍḍal... Manṣūr... All need examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
